evidence.claim: Expertise in LoRA, Search Infrastructure, PyTorch, NLP, Indexing Algorithms, BM25, Text Encoders, Document Processing, pgvector, Haystack, BentoML, scikit-learn, and Information Retrieval Systems.
evidence.source_text: Skills: LoRA (expert), Search Infrastructure (expert), PyTorch (expert), NLP (expert), Indexing Algorithms (expert), BM25 (expert), Text Encoders (expert), Document Processing (expert), pgvector (expert), Haystack (expert), BentoML (advanced), scikit-learn (expert), Information Retrieval Systems (expert)

evidence.claim: Designed ranking layer for flagship product serving millions of items to millions of users.
evidence.source_text: Designed the ranking layer for the company's flagship product: how do we surface the right thing at the right time, across millions of items, for millions of users.

evidence.claim: Owned data pipeline, evaluation framework, and operational discipline for ranking systems for 14 months.
evidence.source_text: I owned all three [data pipeline, evaluation framework, operational discipline] across roughly 14 months.

evidence.claim: Shipped personalization infrastructure, offline experimentation environment, and online A/B testing framework at Salesforce.
evidence.source_text: Shipped the personalization infrastructure... Designed the offline experimentation environment, the online A/B testing framework, and the feature-engineering pipeline

evidence.claim: Collaborated with product and growth teams.
evidence.source_text: Worked closely with the product and growth teams.

evidence.claim: Completed NLP Specialization (2022) and Deep Learning Specialization (2025).
evidence.source_text: Certifications: NLP Specialization (Coursera/DeepLearning.AI, 2022); Deep Learning Specialization (Coursera/DeepLearning.AI, 2025)

evidence.claim: Strong preference for shipping real systems over research-only work; prioritizes v1 in 6 weeks over perfect v2 in 6 months.
evidence.source_text: Strong preference for shipping real systems over research-only work; I'd rather have a working v1 in 6 weeks than a perfect v2 in 6 months.

evidence.claim: Learned from past mistakes including over-engineering and optimizing metrics that did not impact online performance.
evidence.source_text: I've made the standard mistakes — over-engineering early, optimizing offline metrics that didn't move online numbers, building beautiful infrastructure for features that users didn't actually want — so I notice them faster now.
